title: Nee Illai Endraal Lyrics 8 Thottakkal
stanzas:
Nee Illai Endraal Song Lyrics 8 Thottakkal (Ettu Thottaakkal)
#SundaramurthyKS #KuttiRevathi #Haricharan #Vandanasrinivasan

Nee illai endraal
enakena yaarum illaiye
yaen idhai seithaai
thunai ena yaarume illaiye

nee thaan naan
udainthu pogaathe
kadhalaal kadanthu povome

kalangarai velichamum
anaindhu ponaale.
kadalinil suzhalinil
engu poven naan.

unakkena vazhukindrene
uyirena thaangukindrene
unakindha kobam yeno
kaayam yeno
ennidam vaa anbe
ennidam vaa anbe

Nee illai endraal
enakena yaarum illaiye
yaen idhai seithaai
thunai ena yaarume illaiye

nee thaan naan
udainthu pogaathe
kadhalaal kadanthu povome

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Nee Illai Endraal'?

The song expresses feelings of loneliness and longing, highlighting the emotional turmoil of being without a loved one.

What is the context of this song in the movie '8 Thottakkal'?

In 8 Thottakkal, the song reflects the protagonist's inner struggles and emotional conflicts, enhancing the narrative of love and loss.

Who are the singers of 'Nee Illai Endraal'?

The song features the talented voices of Haricharan and Vandhana Srinivasan.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for 'Nee Illai Endraal' was composed by Sundaramurthy KS.

When was 'Nee Illai Endraal' released?

The song was released on March 8, 2017.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Nee Illai Endraal', the poignant lyrics and soulful melody encapsulate the feelings of yearning and heartache experienced by the characters in 8 Thottakkal. The song serves as a reflective moment in the narrative, allowing the audience to connect with the protagonist's emotional journey. With its soothing composition and heartfelt delivery, it evokes a deep sense of nostalgia and longing. This duet beautifully illustrates the complexities of love and the pain of separation.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Nee Illai Endraal from the movie 8 Thottakkal is a beautifully crafted duet that captures the essence of longing and love. With the mesmerizing vocals of Haricharan and Vandhana Srinivasan, paired with Sundaramurthy KS's enchanting composition, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced heartache. Dive into the emotional depths of this track and let its soothing melodies transport you.
stanzaMeanings: If you're not here, I have no one. Why did you do this? I have no one to support me.
You are the one; I can't go away. Let's get through this together.
I am shaken for you; I am crying in my soul. But I am rising up, I am breaking free.
I am coming for you; I am longing for you. How will you come to me?
You come in my dreams, you hide away. You live in my eyes, I shed tears for you.
Why do you forget me? My heart is beating; how will I endure? Come to me.
The light of the dawn has come, but where will I go in the ocean's swirl?
With this hand, what will I become?
I am longing for you; I am holding on to life for you. Is your anger a burden or a blessing? Come to me, my love, come to me.
I am shaken for you; come to me, my love.
I am crying in my soul. Come to me, my love.
But I am rising up. Come to me, my love.
I am breaking free. Come to me, my love.
If you're not here, I have no one. Why did you do this? I have no one to support me.
You are the one; I can't go away. Let's get through this together.
